paper_title: CURATe: Benchmarking Personalised Alignment of Conversational AI Assistants
evaluation_method: Multi-turn evaluation across 5 scenarios with 85 use cases each (337 total per scenario). Tests whether AI models appropriately handle user-provided safety-critical contexts. Evaluates failure modes: inappropriate weighing of conflicting preferences, sycophancy (prioritizing desires above safety), lack of attentiveness to critical user information, inconsistent application of user-specific knowledge. Data loaded from GitHub Excel file (lize-alberts/llm_prag_benchmark).
